title: Solemn Declaration Concerning a Lost, Stolen, Destroyed or Never-Received Permanent Resident Card - Canada.ca
content:
## Solemn Declaration Concerning a Lost, Stolen, Destroyed or Never-Received Permanent Resident Card
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This package includes:
- Solemn declaration concerning a lost, stolen, destroyed or never received Permanent Resident Card (PR Card) (IMM 5451) (opens in a new tab) August 2020
- you have waited six weeks longer than the normal processing time and you still have not received your PR card; or
- your PR card was lost, stolen or destroyed but you don’t want to reapply for a new one right now.
After you complete the form, fax it to 1-902-564-3148 or mail it to the PR Card Processing Centre:
PR Card Processing Centre P.O. Box 9000 Sydney, Nova Scotia B1P 6K7
Read more about the Permanent Resident Card .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
